Natural.name: Dewy Minimalist
Natural.description: Sheer tinted moisturizer evens tone, cream blush melts into cheeks, brushed-up brows frame softly curled lashes, clear balm glosses lips, leaving skin luminous, healthy, utterly breathable and effortless.

Natural.name: Sun-kissed No-Makeup
Natural.description: Lightweight gel bronzer warms perimeter, freckles dotted across nose, peach stain kisses cheeks, fluffy mascara defines subtly, lip oil adds juicy sheen, creating believable beach holiday radiance.

Natural.name: Fresh-Faced Glow
Natural.description: Hydrating primer plumps skin, pastel pink cream highlighter taps onto high points, neutral satin shadow brightens lids, feathery brows, tint balm, delivering innocent lit-from-within freshness ideal for everyday.

Dramatic.name: Smoky Seductress
Dramatic.description: Charcoal and espresso shadows blended past crease, lower lashline smudged, waterline kohl intense, sculpted contour chisels cheeks, vampy burgundy lips, strategic strobing sparks temples, creating unforgettable smoldering evening presence.

Dramatic.name: Graphic Wing
Dramatic.description: Matte white lid sets stage for razor-sharp jet-black wing that extends toward temple then double-lines into crease, cheeks softly bronzed, nude velvet lips keep spotlight on architectural eye artwork.

Dramatic.name: High-Voltage Glam
Dramatic.description: Electric fuchsia glitter smoked over lids, holographic foiled highlight beams cheekbones, mega flutter false lashes, crystalline rhinestones trace brow bone, metallic magenta lip lacquer finishes fearless runway-worthy statement.

Cultural.name: Geisha-Inspired Elegance
Cultural.description: Porcelain white base perfected, soft crimson gradient covers inner lips, charcoal defines upper lash line, blush drapes from temples inward, delicate hand-painted sakura petal accents grace cheekbone for refined artistry.

Cultural.name: Bollywood Bridal
Cultural.description: Rich gold shimmer washes eyelids, emerald kajal rims eyes, fluttery lashes flourish, cheeks warmed with terracotta, bindi placed precisely, glossy cherry lips complete opulent, dance-ready look reflecting Indian wedding splendour.

Cultural.name: Día de los Muertos Calavera
Cultural.description: White skeletal base, black hollows contour eyes and nose, vibrant marigold, turquoise and fuchsia filigree patterns bloom outward, rhinestone petals frame sockets, crimson rose painted chin honors ancestral celebration.

Cultural.name: Maasai Tribal Vibrance
Cultural.description: Earthy red ochre foundation applied thinly, white dots symmetrically adorn brow ridge and cheekbones, cobalt vertical stripe down nose, matte dark berry lip, evoking traditional Kenyan warrior ceremonial aesthetics.

Seasonal.name: Spring Blossom
Seasonal.description: Pastel lavender and mint shadows softly blended, rosy baby cheeks, fluffy brushed brows, glossy petal-pink lips, dewy skin sprinkled with tiny hand-drawn flower clusters, embodying garden awakening sweetness.

Seasonal.name: Summer Neon Splash
Seasonal.description: Hot lime graphic liner cuts across bronze lids, fluorescent coral cheeks, golden body shimmer, waterproof spiky lashes, watermelon gloss amplifies pout, projecting carefree pool-party energy under blazing sunshine.

Seasonal.name: Autumn Spice
Seasonal.description: Burnt orange matte shadow halos eyes, cinnamon smoked lower lashline, copper foil pop center lid, soft brown lip stain, freckled complexion, giving cozy sweater-weather vibe reminiscent pumpkin latte.

Seasonal.name: Winter Frost Queen
Seasonal.description: Icy silver pigment blankets lids to brow, opalescent glitter snowflakes placed at outer corners, cheeks highlighted with cool pearl, matte mauve lips, overall crystalline look echoing silent frosted landscapes.

Celebrity-Inspired.name: Classic Marilyn
Celebrity-Inspired.description: Porcelain matte complexion, diffused sculpting, champagne shimmer lids, dramatic half-lash, inky kitten flick, bold blue-based red overdrawn lips, beauty mark dotted precisely, radiating timeless Hollywood bombshell confidence.

Celebrity-Inspired.name: Rihanna Red Carpet
Celebrity-Inspired.description: Soft matte foundation, hyper-real contour, gilded green smokey eyes, fluttery 3D lashes, buff nude glossy lips, diamanté highlight spanning collarbones, delivering fearless, sultry, effortlessly cool Fenty-inspired statement.

Celebrity-Inspired.name: Euphoria Zendaya
Celebrity-Inspired.description: Translucent gel skin, lilac and turquoise cloudlike eyeshadow blended to brows, scattered flatback crystals around orbital, lavender mascara, holographic lavender gloss, creating dreamy, experimental Gen-Z moodboard reminiscent HBO series.

Celebrity-Inspired.name: Twiggy Mod
Celebrity-Inspired.description: Pale matte base, taupe crease cut high, white lid, exaggerated painted-on lower lashes, chunky black top lashes, subtle peach lip, delivering swinging sixties London youthquake energy.

Fantasy.name: Mermaid Siren
Fantasy.description: Aqua and teal metallic scales stenciled along temples, iridescent pigments glaze lids, pearls adhered on brow, holographic green lip topper, wet-look highlighter mimics seawater sheen under moonlight.

Fantasy.name: Forest Elf
Fantasy.description: Olive cream contour carves angular ears illusion, mossy shimmer washes eyelids, gold leaf freckles scatter nose, pressed fern imprint across cheek, cocoa balm, emanating mystical woodland guardian aura.

Fantasy.name: Galactic Alien
Fantasy.description: Chrome purple base covers entire face, high points airbrushed with lime duochrome, black negative-space lip, white holographic liner creates constellations around eyes, giving otherworldly cosmic traveler appearance.

Fantasy.name: Fire Phoenix
Fantasy.description: Gradient sunset reds, oranges, and golds wing dramatically past brows, feather strokes painted outward, glitter embers dust under eyes, metallic crimson lips, incandescent highlighter for reborn mythical bird flair.

Artistic.name: Pop Art Comic
Artistic.description: Matte complexion becomes canvas, bold black outlines trace exaggerated features, dotted Ben-Day patterns fill cheeks, electric primary colors block eyelids and lips, capturing Roy Lichtenstein graphic storytelling aesthetic.

Artistic.name: Watercolor Wash
Artistic.description: Pastel pigments diluted with mixing medium sweep fluidly over face, soft edges bleed like paint on paper, translucent layers overlap, ethereal glossy highlight and clear lashes mirror fresh artwork.

Artistic.name: Cubist Abstract
Artistic.description: Angles of tri-tone foundation in beige, olive, terracotta sculpt planes, mismatched geometric shapes painted around eyes and lips, black graphic lines segment features, producing Picasso-influenced fragmented perspective.

Artistic.name: Neon Drip
Artistic.description: Fluorescent pigments poured along creases then allowed to drip down cheeks like wet paint, matte skin for contrast, UV-reactive liner rims eyes, clear gloss lip underscores edgy installation vibe.

Historical.name: Victorian Porcelain
Historical.description: Full-coverage alabaster foundation, softly rouged apples, delicately arched natural brows, tightlined lashes with cake mascara, rosebud lips created using darker edges and bitten center, embodying demure 19th-century societal propriety.

Historical.name: Roaring Twenties Flapper
Historical.description: Thin penciled brows, smoky kohl eyes rounded downward, glittering champagne on lids, heavy mascara clumps lashes, Cupid’s bow sharply defined with vampy oxblood lipstick, producing rebellious Jazz Age glamour.

Historical.name: Ancient Egyptian Royal
Historical.description: Matte bronze complexion, eyebrows extended into long straight line, thick cobalt lapis liner wings to temples, gold foil on lids, terracotta stained lips, embodying divine power of Nefertiti.

Historical.name: 18th Century Rococo
Historical.description: Pale rice powder base, bright pink circles of rouge high on cheeks, silk-finish white eyelashes, tiny black velvet heart patch near lip, cherry stain, channeling Versailles court opulence.

Theatrical.name: Clown Pierrot
Theatrical.description: Stark white greasepaint base, exaggerated teardrop eyes in black, sad red mouth painted small and downturned, single blue diamond on forehead, giving melancholic mime aesthetic suitable for ballet stage.

Theatrical.name: Greek Tragedy Mask
Theatrical.description: Matte bone-colored foundation, heavy black liner shapes exaggerated cat eyes, crimson lip extended to cheeks forming mask smile, foreheads shaded deeply, gold leaf on temples, projecting ancient amphitheatre intensity.

Theatrical.name: Kabuki Warrior
Theatrical.description: White rice powder base dominates, bold scarlet and black angular lines carve across cheeks and eyes, brows blocked, crimson lips, emphasizing strength and supernatural aura of traditional Japanese theatre.

Theatrical.name: Pantomime Dame
Theatrical.description: Glowing pink cheeks exaggerated to temples, oversized expressive brows, glitter shadow, heavily lined eyes, cherry clown smile stretched wide, powdered décolletage, delivering campy comedic character beloved in British holiday productions.

Gothic.name: Romantic Victorian Goth
Gothic.description: Translucent ivory foundation, hollows shaded with cool greys, soot-black smudged eyes, lace-inspired eyeliner flicks, matte dried-blood lips, subtle silver highlight, achieving melancholic elegance echoing crumbling candlelit mansions.

Gothic.name: Cyber Goth Rave
Gothic.description: Neon green contour, UV-reactive blacklight stripes across cheeks, sharp black vinyl lipstick, spidery false lashes, metallic chrome brows, overall industrial futurepunk darkness ready for subterranean warehouse dance floor.

Gothic.name: Vampiric Aristocrat
Gothic.description: Porcelain matte base, dramatic hollow contour, burgundy-black gradient lip revealing subtle fangs, blood-red inner corner eye wash, glossy highlight only on high nose bridge, channeling eternal decadent predator.

Festival.name: Coachella Boho
Festival.description: Sun-drenched bronzer, rose-gold shimmer lids, white freckle dots across nose, turquoise glitter tears, face gems along brows, coral gloss, providing laid-back desert festival sparkle perfect under flower crowns.

Festival.name: Carnival Samba
Festival.description: Vibrant rainbow cut-crease eyes, feather lash extensions, gold body paint highlighter, ruby glitter lips, rhinestones tracing cheekbones, energetic makeup pulsates with Brazilian drums along Rio parade route.

Festival.name: Holi Color Burst
Festival.description: Matte skin purposely minimal, allowing explosive powders of fuchsia, saffron, teal loosely splattered across face, neon liner peeking through, glossy balm, embodying joyful chaos of Indian festival of colors.

Bridal.name: Classic Western Bride
Bridal.description: Airbrushed satin foundation, champagne shimmer inner corners, wispy lashes, soft sculpt, ballerina blush, creamy rose lipstick kissed with gloss, delivering timeless, camera-ready radiance that endures sentimental photographs.

Bridal.name: South Asian Bride
Bridal.description: Full-coverage luminous base, burgundy and gold halo eyes, thick winged kajal, bold 3D lashes, scarlet matte lips, strategic highlighter, meant to complement heavy jewelry and richly embroidered lehenga.

Bridal.name: Bohemian Elopement
Bridal.description: Lightweight tinted serum evens, freckles embraced, terra-cotta wash on lids and cheeks, creamy nude lip, subtle gold leaf accents near temples, conveying carefree outdoor vows under setting sun.

Cyberpunk.name: Neon Circuitry
Cyberpunk.description: Matte grey base, chrome cheek panels, lime and cyan lines mimic motherboard traces across temples, ultraviolet eyeliner, black ombré lips, reflective highlighter, projecting dystopian tech metropolis vibe.

Cyberpunk.name: Hologram Hacker
Cyberpunk.description: Oil-slick multichrome shadow spans brow to cheekbone, digital numbers stamped under eye, glitchy pixel lips created with alternating matte black and foil silver, luminous strobe ignites binary rebel persona.

Cyberpunk.name: Synthwave Sunset
Cyberpunk.description: Magenta-to-orange gradient liner mirrors retro horizon, indigo blush swept onto temples, grid pattern highlighted on cheek using violet lasers, glossy electric pink lips, celebrating 80s futuristic nostalgia aesthetic.

Kawaii.name: Pastel Fairy Kei
Kawaii.description: Cotton-candy pink foundation, baby blue blush high under eyes, white eyeliner widens gaze, star sequins on cheeks, ombré lavender gloss, crafting sugary sweet doll-like cuteness emblematic of Tokyo street style.

Kawaii.name: Magical Girl Sparkle
Kawaii.description: Glittery doe eyes with exaggerated lower lashes, heart-shaped blush on apples, iridescent highlighter, glossy coral lips, tiny moon decals near temples, radiating anime heroine optimism ready for transformation sequence.

Kawaii.name: Harajuku Lolita
Kawaii.description: Flawless porcelain base, strawberry blush across nose, oversized circle lenses enhanced by thick black top lashes and lower lash clusters, bow-shaped cherry lips, delicate lace sticker under eye.

Avant-Garde.name: Monochrome Negative Space
Avant-Garde.description: Entire face airbrushed matte white, strategic jet-black blocks around eyes and mouth leave crisp unused gaps, brows erased, lashes painted white, producing high-contrast editorial look defying conventional facial mapping.
